---
title: "Upcoming Events"
format: html
---

## Upcoming Events

::: {.events-list}

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
03 April 2026
:::

### Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 1/4

**Location:** Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
:::

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
10 April 2026
:::

### Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 2/4

**Location:** Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
:::

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
16 April 2026
:::

### TÜBİTAK Science Talks-1: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World

**Location:** Ankara Lisesi, Ankara
:::

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
17 April 2026
:::

### Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 3/4

**Location:** Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
:::

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
24 April 2026
:::

### Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 4/4

**Location:** Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University
:::

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
29 April 2026
:::

### TÜBİTAK Science Talks-2: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World

**Location:** Yayla Mesleki ve Teknik Anadolu Lisesi, Zonguldak
:::

::: {.event-card}
::: {.event-date}
30 April 2026
:::

### TÜBİTAK Science Talks-3: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World

**Location:** Gerede Hacı Sadık Öztosun Anadolu Lisesi, Bolu
:::

:::
